name: Peanut Butter Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a package of 8 oz. cream cheese to room temperature.
2. In a large bowl, combine powdered sugar and creamy peanut butter. Beat until smooth.
3. Add the 1 cup of heavy cream and mix well.
4. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
5. Press the cookie crumbs and melted butter into a 9-inch pie pan. Set aside in the freezer while you prepare the filling.
6. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the prepared crust.
7. Sprinkle with chopped, salted peanuts.
8. Place in the freezer for at least 2 hours. The pie can be made several days in advance.
